title: Cobblemon Options Con Tim
description: Everything you didn't know you wanted to be configurable in Cobblemon.
body:
# Options Con Tim

v1.6-0.0.0

[Links](https://cobble.timinc.us/?loader=fabric&version=1.6&id=optionscontim)

## About

Options Con Tim adds a bunch of new config options to custom fit how you play Cobblemon to your preferences. At the moment, this is a lie, as it only adds one option, but this will change over time as I find new things to chuck in here.

## Testing

Eventually I will just have this section point to “go pick an option, change its value, and test it out,” but for now, fire the game up at least once, go over to the config, change `outOfBattleCaptures` to `false`, run `/reload` in-game (or restart the server/singleplayer client), and observe that you can no longer capture Pokémon by just chucking balls at them outside of battle.

## Applications

I mean, at the moment, its main application is if you don’t want your players (or yourself in a singleplayer world) to catch Pokémon outside of battle. Not gonna lie, this is fluff so Modrinth and CurseForge approve this really small mod (that I promise will definitely/probably grow).

## How it Works

[Config Options](https://www.notion.so/Config-Options-20e16db299a6805db850c19d6b4b6211?pvs=21)

## Status

I mean, it’s published, it’s just smol. It fits the expectations of the mod at this very moment. Come visit us [at the Discord](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv) to talk, ask questions, and give feedback about the mod!
